tracking_fields.sent_count: Total outreach emails sent in V2
tracking_fields.opens_available: Gmail doesn't provide read receipts — track replies only
tracking_fields.embeds: Confirmed widget embeds on publisher sites
tracking_fields.page_linked: Which QFINHUB URL received the link
tracking_fields.anchor_context: Anchor text used (if any) and surrounding context
tracking_fields.traffic_from_referral: Visits from referral sources (GA4 or Vercel Analytics)
tracking_fields.gsc_movement: Any GSC impression/click changes after backlink acquisition

success_thresholds.metric: At least 1 reply within 7 days of sending 5 test emails
success_thresholds.fail_action: Review targeting, subject lines, and offers. If offers are strong but no replies, test different contact methods (contact forms vs email).

success_thresholds.metric: At least 2 replies from first 20 V2 sends
success_thresholds.fail_action: Pause email outreach. Pivot to journalist/source-response and partnership directories.

success_thresholds.metric: At least 1 backlink OR embed OR positive reply by Jun 26
success_thresholds.fail_action: Full strategy review. Consider content-driven authority (data studies, original research) instead of outreach.

failure_rule: If V2 gets 0/20 replies, STOP email outreach and pivot to journalist/source-response and partnership directories.

gsc_monitoring.watch_for: New referring domains appearing in GSC links report
gsc_monitoring.check_frequency: Weekly (manual GSC check or via gsc-live-data skill)
gsc_monitoring.alert_if: Any new backlink appears — investigate source and quality
